title: National Secure Data Platform Managed Services
summary: Managed cloud, service desk, and cyber operations support for a cross-agency secure data platform.
description: Seeking a prime contractor to operate a sovereign cloud platform, service management tooling, and security operations runbook uplift.

title: Regional Workforce Analytics and Reporting Platform
agency: Department of Employment and Workplace Relations
summary: Delivery of workforce dashboards, data integration, and quarterly policy reporting packs.
description: This procurement covers data ingestion, dashboard implementation, reporting automation, and training for workforce forecasting users.
